seo.title: Refresh — All-in-one retail management: inventory, POS, CRM, analytics
seo.description: Refresh is cloud retail management software for Central Asia. Inventory, POS, customers, finance and marketing in one system.
seo.keywords: retail POS, inventory management, shop software, CRM retail, Central Asia POS, Tajikistan, Uzbekistan, Refresh

demo.rest: and our managers will get in touch with you

success.title: Thank you! Your request was sent
success.body: Our manager will reach out to you shortly.

index.title: Built for every kind of store
index.subtitle: From fashion boutiques to hardware stores — Refresh adapts to the way your business sells.
index.seoTitle: Solutions for every type of store — Refresh
index.seoDescription: Refresh is the operating system for retail: clothing, shoes, grocery, hardware, cosmetics, accessories, electronics and home goods.

shared.subtitle: Track inventory, learn customer preferences, grow sales with analytics, and manage staff and finances — all in one cloud platform.
shared.platformTitle: Everything included, out of the box
shared.platformSubtitle: Whatever you sell, the core platform does the heavy lifting.
shared.finalTitle: Ready to run your store the modern way?
shared.finalSubtitle: Try Refresh free for 7 days. Setup in 15 minutes, support in your language.

platform.f1: Inventory with color / size / attribute tracking
platform.f8: Mobile app for owner and cashier

clothing.name: Clothing store
clothing.short: Sizes, colors, seasons — all under control.
clothing.title: Clothing stores grow with Refresh
clothing.seoTitle: Refresh for clothing stores — POS, inventory, CRM
clothing.seoDescription: Retail platform for fashion boutiques and clothing chains. Track sizes and colors, run loyalty, grow sales.
clothing.benefitsTitle: Made for the way you sell clothes

b1.title: Size × color matrix
b1.body: Track every SKU by size and color. One-click variants, photos per item.

b2.title: Seasonal collections
b2.body: Plan drops by season, tag items with collection labels, archive old lines fast.

b3.title: Smart discounts
b3.body: Automatic end-of-season markdowns, coupon codes, bundled outfits.

shoes.name: Shoe store
shoes.short: Pair storage, size grids, fast restock.
shoes.title: Shoe stores grow with Refresh
shoes.seoTitle: Refresh for shoe stores — POS, size grids, CRM
shoes.seoDescription: Built for sneaker shops and footwear chains. Track size grids, manage paired stock, scale across stores.

b1.title: Size grids per model
b1.body: Manage sizes 35–48 per model and color. See exactly what's low.

b2.title: Paired storage logic
b2.body: Both shoes count as one item; mispairs and returns tracked automatically.

b3.title: Lookbook photos
b3.body: Attach multiple photos to each model — staff and customers see what they're buying.

grocery.name: Grocery store
grocery.title: Grocery stores grow with Refresh
grocery.seoTitle: Refresh for grocery stores — fast POS, expiry tracking
grocery.seoDescription: POS for supermarkets and convenience stores. Weighing scales, expiry alerts, fast checkout, shrinkage control.
grocery.benefitsTitle: Speed and shrinkage control for grocery

b1.title: Scales & weighed items
b1.body: Native support for weighing scales, price-per-kilo items, and sticker barcodes.

b2.title: Expiry tracking
b2.body: Shelf-life alerts before products expire. Zero write-offs you didn't expect.

b3.title: Blazing fast POS
b3.body: Sub-3-second checkout with barcode scan and keypad shortcuts for top SKUs.

hardware.name: Hardware store
hardware.title: Hardware stores grow with Refresh
hardware.seoTitle: Refresh for hardware stores — inventory, multi-warehouse
hardware.seoDescription: Retail software for construction and hardware shops. Bulk upload, inter-warehouse transfers, price revaluation by FX.
hardware.benefitsTitle: Made for hardware and construction retail

b1.title: Bulk import from Excel
b1.body: Thousands of SKUs? Upload a spreadsheet. Update prices in batch.

b2.title: Multi-warehouse transfers
b2.body: Move stock between storefront and backroom. Consolidated view across all locations.

b3.title: FX-based revaluation
b3.body: Imported goods? Revalue the whole catalog when exchange rates shift.

cosmetics.name: Cosmetics store
cosmetics.title: Cosmetics stores grow with Refresh
cosmetics.seoTitle: Refresh for cosmetics stores — batches, expiry, loyalty
cosmetics.seoDescription: Beauty retail platform with batch tracking, expiry alerts, sample management, and loyalty for repeat buyers.

b1.title: Batch & expiry tracking
b1.body: Every bottle tracked by batch. FIFO rotation, alerts before expiry.

b2.title: Tester & sample stock
b2.body: Split consumable testers from sellable stock. No more fake shrinkage.

b3.title: VIP loyalty
b3.body: Reward repeat customers with tiered discounts and birthday offers.

accessories.name: Accessories store
accessories.short: Bags, watches, jewelry — track each SKU.
accessories.title: Accessories stores grow with Refresh
accessories.seoTitle: Refresh for accessories stores — bags, watches, jewelry
accessories.seoDescription: For bag, watch, and jewelry retailers. Per-item photos, certificate tracking, anti-theft audit trail.

b1.title: Per-item photos & codes
b1.body: High-value items get unique IDs, photos and certificates attached.

b2.title: Anti-theft audit trail
b2.body: Every view, move and sale logged. Know exactly who touched what.

b3.title: Custom engraving & orders
b3.body: Handle made-to-order, engraving, and reservations without spreadsheets.

electronics.name: Electronics store
electronics.title: Electronics stores grow with Refresh
electronics.seoTitle: Refresh for electronics stores — IMEI, warranty, service
electronics.seoDescription: For phone shops and electronics retailers. IMEI/serial tracking, warranty claims, after-sales service history.

b1.title: IMEI & serial tracking
b1.body: Every device scanned and linked to the buyer. Instant lookup in returns or warranty.

b2.title: Warranty & service
b2.body: Track warranty period per item, log repairs, attach invoices.

b3.title: Online catalog
b3.body: Sync your stock to your website and marketplaces in one click.

home-goods.name: Home goods
home-goods.title: Home goods stores grow with Refresh
home-goods.seoTitle: Refresh for home goods — furniture, decor, delivery
home-goods.seoDescription: For furniture and home decor chains. Showroom stock, special orders, delivery scheduling, multi-location transfers.
home-goods.benefitsTitle: Built for furniture and home decor

b1.title: Showroom vs. warehouse
b1.body: Separate display items from sellable stock. Order fulfillment from any warehouse.

b2.title: Special orders & deposits
b2.body: Take partial payments, schedule deliveries, keep the customer in the loop.

b3.title: Inter-store transfers
b3.body: Move heavy items between stores with full tracking and cost allocation.

showcase.title: One platform — everywhere your store works
showcase.subtitle: POS on tablet, inventory on phone, analytics on laptop — all data syncs automatically.

pos.title: Fast POS on a tablet
pos.description: Sell from a tablet, laptop or phone. Intuitive interface — train a cashier in 10 minutes.

points.p3: Accepts cash, cards and online payments

mobile.title: Run your store from your phone
mobile.description: Track sales, stock and staff from anywhere. Real-time notifications for what matters.

points.p2: Receive inventory with your phone camera
points.p3: Chat with staff inside the app

analytics.title: Every number at your fingertips
analytics.description: 40+ reports — sales, profit, ABC analysis, staff KPIs. One-click export to Excel.

features.title: One program — every store task
features.subtitle: Refresh replaces a dozen disconnected tools and unifies them into a single management system.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Scan, receive and transfer goods between locations. Real-time stock you can trust.

customers.title: CRM & loyalty
customers.description: Customer base, bonuses, segmentation and campaigns. Bring buyers back and grow basket size.

pos.title: POS & sales
pos.description: Fast POS on laptop, tablet or phone. Works offline and syncs automatically.

analytics.title: Reports & analytics
analytics.description: 40+ reports: sales, profit, ABC analysis, staff KPIs. Decisions based on real data.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: SMS and Telegram campaigns, coupons, gift certificates and promos. Built-in — no third parties.

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Cash, accounts, debts and expenses. Control cash flow and know your real profit.

integrations.title: The brands that run on Refresh
integrations.subtitle: From family boutiques to growing retail chains across Central Asia.

testimonials.title: Trusted by thousands of stores
testimonials.subtitle: Stories from entrepreneurs who grew with Refresh.

one.quote: Six months with Refresh and we opened a second location. Clear reports, stock under control, and POS works even with no internet.
one.name: Aziza Rahimova

two.quote: We moved from 1C to Refresh — simpler, faster, no license fees. Support is always there.
two.name: Dilshod Karimov

three.quote: SMS campaigns paid for themselves in a week. Customers come back and average ticket is up 22%.
three.name: Munisa Safarova

pricing.title: Honest pricing in your local currency
pricing.subtitle: Simple plans that scale with your shop. All tiers include updates, cloud storage and local-language support.
pricing.addLocation: Additional location: {value}/mo · upgrade or downgrade anytime.
pricing.billzNote: Prices shown in your local currency. Switch countries to see regional pricing.

compare.title: Everything included, tier by tier
compare.subtitle: Full feature matrix so you can see exactly what's in each plan.

features.i1: Categorize products by colors, sizes and attributes
features.i2: Track by unit of measure (pieces, meters, kg, …)
features.i4: Auto-create products from GS1 barcode database
features.i6: Live stock view across all locations
features.p1: Fast POS on laptop, tablet or phone
features.p2: Barcode scanner and fiscal printer support
features.p3: Offline mode — keeps selling without internet
features.p5: Cash, card and online payment acceptance
features.c3: Loyalty program with points and levels

features.f4: Core modules: POS, inventory, receipts & basic reports

q1.q: Do I need to install anything?
q1.a: No. Refresh runs in the browser and mobile apps. Just sign up.

q2.a: Yes. The register keeps working offline and syncs when you're back online.

q3.q: How do I migrate from 1C or Excel?
q3.a: Import items, stock and customers via spreadsheets or API. We assist for free during onboarding.

q4.a: Base setup and training are free on all plans. Custom configuration is available on request.

q5.a: Yes — apps for owners and cashiers on iOS and Android.

q6.a: Russian, Tajik, Uzbek and English. Each employee can pick their own.

finalCta.title: Run your store the modern way
finalCta.subtitle: Set up Refresh in 15 minutes. 7 days free, no card, with support in your language.

footer.tagline: Cloud retail management platform. Inventory, POS, CRM, finance and marketing — in one system.
